name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

statusCode.label: Status code
statusCode.description: The response status code; blank uses msg.statusCode, otherwise 200.

headers.label: Headers
headers.description: Default response headers, merged with msg.headers.

input.label: Response
input.description: The reply for the pending HTTP request — body, status code, and headers, read from output (an nrg node) or the top level (a core or injected message).
